title: Gold Holds Gain as US, Iran Prepare to Sign Interim Peace Deal
title_cn: 美国和伊朗准备签署临时和平协议，金价保持上涨
summary: Gold held gains, as the US and Iran prepared to sign an interim peace deal that may ease global inflationary pressures arising from the war.

title: Financial Details Emerge as US, Iran Prepare for Signing
title_cn: 美国和伊朗准备签署财务细节
summary: The US and Iran are preparing to formally sign an interim peace deal, with details of the accord still emerging and energy insiders skeptical of how fast it can reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg Economics' Chris Kennedy breaks down the latest developments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Asian Stocks Poised to Drop as Fed Decision Looms: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着美联储决定的临近，亚洲股​​市有望下跌：市场结束
summary: Stocks in Asia looked set to snap a three-day winning run, tracking declines on Wall Street as investors rotated out of technology shares and positioned for the first Federal Reserve policy decision under Chairman Kevin Warsh.

title: China Stock Gauge Sinks as Traders Favor AI Winners Elsewhere
title_cn: 随着交易员青睐其他地方的人工智能赢家，中国股市下跌
summary: Chinese stocks listed in Hong Kong are facing bleak milestones as a global rush into artificial intelligence supply chain players sidelines the Internet and consumer companies that dominate the offshore benchmark.

title: Laopu Gold’s Searing Rally Cools as Sales Slip, Bullion Falls
title_cn: 老铺黄金的强劲涨势因销售下滑而降温，金价下跌
summary: Slowing sales, a slump in its share price and a selloff in the gold market are fueling concerns that Laopu Gold Co., one of China’s hottest consumer brands, is losing momentum.

title: Oil Holds Near Three-Month Low as Iran Deal Seen Boosting Supply
title_cn: 伊朗协议增加供应，油价维持近三个月低点
summary: Oil held near a three-month low on expectations that a US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz will unleash a wave of supply.

title: JBS, Embraer Courted in Venezuela as Brazil Seeks New Ties
title_cn: 巴西寻求新关系，JBS 和巴西航空工业公司向委内瑞拉求爱
summary: Brazilian companies are racing to plant their flag in Venezuela as the country reemerges from more than a decade of isolation.

title: Kalshi Aims to Expand Perpetual Futures After $5.5 Billion Debut
title_cn: Kalshi 首次发行 55 亿美元后计划扩大永续合约规模
summary: Kalshi Inc. is looking to expand its new perpetual futures business beyond digital assets after the never-expiring derivatives racked up more than $5.5 billion of trading volume in their first two weeks on the prediction-market platform.

title: Inside the Palace: How Prabowo’s Circle Is Unnerving Investors
title_cn: 宫殿内部：普拉博沃的圈子如何让投资者感到不安
summary: Unpredictable state intervention under Indonesia’s president is turning the emerging-market darling into a global laggard.

title: Damodaran: AI Shaky, High-Potential Business for SpaceX
title_cn: Damodaran：AI 不稳定，SpaceX 的高潜力业务
summary: On the third day of trading, SpaceX's market capitalization surged to approximately $2.7 trillion, positioning the company to surpass Amazon in market value. Joining the discussion, Aswath Damodaran, Professor of Finance at NYU Stern School of Business, provided his valuation perspective. He explained that his recent analysis estimated SpaceX's enterprise value at around $1.2 trillion and equity value near $1.3 trillion, roughly half of the current market cap. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Obama Foundation CEO Valerie Jarrett on Presidential Center Opening
title_cn: 奥巴马基金会首席执行官瓦莱丽·贾勒特 (Valerie Jarrett) 谈总统中心开幕
summary: On June 16th, Valerie Jarrett, CEO of The Obama Foundation, discusses the opening of the Obama Presidential Center. She discusses the importance of opening this building, especially at the point in the county's history. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging FX Index Edges Up on Peace Deal Ahead of Fed Meeting
title_cn: 美联储会议前和平协议推动新兴外汇指数小幅上涨
summary: An index for emerging-market currencies edged higher before the end-of-day adjustment Monday as traders weighed the interim peace deal between the US and Iran against uncertainty from the Federal Reserve’s upcoming policy meeting.

title: Oil Falls to Three-Month Low as US-Iran Deal Set to Add Supply
title_cn: 美伊协议将增加供应，油价跌至三个月低点
summary: Oil logged its longest run of declines this year as the US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz boosted expectations for a revival in supply, with leading Wall Street banks reducing their price forecasts and key market gauges tumbling.

title: Exxon to Supply LNG to Help South Africa Reduce Reliance on Coal
title_cn: 埃克森美孚将供应液化天然气以帮助南非减少对煤炭的依赖
summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. struck a preliminary deal to bring liquefied natural gas to South Africa, which will use the fuel to bolster its coal-reliant power grid, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Private-Credit Defaults Match 2023 High in a KBRA Index
title_cn: KBRA 指数中的私人信贷违约率达到 2023 年高点
summary: The default rate among private-credit borrowers has reached the highest in the roughly three-year history of an index from Kroll Bond Rating Agency LLC, adding to signs of stress in the $1.8 trillion industry.

title: Biofuels Are Key to Avoiding Sharp Farmland Drop, S&P Says
title_cn: 标准普尔表示，生物燃料是避免农田急剧减少的关键
summary: Expanding biofuel demand is a “powerful catalyst” to restore profitability to American farms, according to a new study, as harvests balloon and lawmakers consider broadening the market for corn-based ethanol.

title: T-Shirt Maker Gildan Plunges on Short Seller’s Revenue Claim
title_cn: T 恤制造商 Gildan 因卖空者的收入主张而暴跌
summary: Shares of Gildan Activewear Inc. tumbled the most in more than six years after short seller Jehoshaphat Research published a negative report accusing the company of inflating revenue.

title: Bond Options Traders Split on Fed Rate Path as Warsh Era Begins
title_cn: 沃什时代开始，债券期权交易员对美联储利率路径产生分歧
summary: Options traders are increasingly divided over the Federal Reserve’s near-term rate path, with conflicting bets that span from cuts to various degrees of hikes over the coming months.

title: Tech Stocks Halt S&P 500 Rally | Closing Bell
title_cn: 科技股阻止标普 500 指数涨势 |结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nasdaq 100 Falls 2% as Chipmakers Halt Solid Run: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 芯片制造商停止稳健运行，纳斯达克 100 指数下跌 2%：市场休整
summary: A rally that sent the US stock benchmark to the brink of a record paused before the first Federal Reserve rate decision under Kevin Warsh, with a another slide in oil prices driving bond yields lower.

title: S&P 500 Slips as Semiconductor Stocks Take a Breather; SpaceX Extends Gains
title_cn: 半导体股稍作喘息，标普 500 指数下跌； SpaceX 扩大涨幅
summary: US stocks fell Tuesday, led lower by technology company declines after days of big gains.

title: More Evidence of a Relevering US Economy
title_cn: 更多证据表明美国经济正在发挥作用
summary: Households debt is gathering steam.

title: SpaceX Overtakes Amazon in Value as Post-IPO Rally Reaches 49%
title_cn: SpaceX 市值超越亚马逊 IPO 后涨幅达 49%
summary: SpaceX jumped for a third straight day on Tuesday, overtaking Amazon.com Inc. in value to become the fifth-largest stock in the world.

title: Bondholders Forced to Reckon With $4 Billion Tax Threat in Bitter Credit Feud
title_cn: 债权人在激烈的信贷纠纷中被迫面对 40 亿美元的税收威胁
summary: Patrick Drahi was running out of options to save his debt-ridden telecom empire.

title: Argentina Secures World Bank Backing for $2 Billion Private Loan
title_cn: 阿根廷获得世界银行 20 亿美元私人贷款支持
summary: The World Bank’s board approved guarantees for a commercial loan of as much as $2 billion that Argentina intends to use to help pay down upcoming debt maturities.

title: Gold Advances as Trump Touts Reopening of Hormuz This Week
title_cn: 随着特朗普本周重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，金价上涨
summary: Gold rose after US President Donald Trump said the Strait of Hormuz could reopen on Friday, a development that would ease an energy and inflation shock that has roiled global markets.

title: Oil Falls Below $80 For First Time in More Than Three Months
title_cn: 油价三个多月来首次跌破 80 美元
summary: Brent oil fell below $80 a barrel for the first time in more than three months as the US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz boosted expectations for a revival in supply, with leading Wall Street banks reducing their price forecasts and regional benchmarks collapsing. Gasoline prices are also falling. Bloomberg Mike McGlone joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Philippines Raises $2.5 Billion in Its Second Deal of Year
title_cn: 菲律宾今年第二笔交易筹集 25 亿美元
summary: The Philippines raised $2.5 billion from its second international bond sale of the year, seizing the opportunity to finance government spending as borrowing costs ease amid optimism about a potential US-Iran peace agreement.

title: SoftBank Scales Back Latin America Tech Bets as Venture Capital Boom Fades
title_cn: 随着风险投资热潮的消退，软银缩减了对拉丁美洲科技的投资
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. is struggling to find startups in Latin America ready for major investments, underscoring how sharply the tech boom there has cooled since attracting record levels of venture capital only a few years ago.

title: Kalshi's Mansour Sees Uptick in Small Business Use of Hedging
title_cn: 卡尔希的曼苏尔认为小企业对套期保值的使用有所增加
summary: Kalshi co-founder Tarek Mansour discusses the increased utilization of hedging at the Bloomberg Market Structure Conference. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Can Play 'Significant' Role in Tech for Managing Diabetes, Says David Roman
title_cn: 大卫·罗曼 (David Roman) 表示，人工智能可以在糖尿病管理技术中发挥“重要”作用
summary: David Roman,  US medtech and healthcare IT research analyst for Goldman Sachs, said that AI play a 'significant' role in helping patients stay on top of their diabetes, with companies like Abbott and Dexcom using new technology to count carbohydrates and deliver the right amount of insulin. Roman, joined by Bloomberg health reporter Madison Muller, said that he came away from Goldman Sach's annual medtech conference 'very bullish' on innovation across the industry.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon Faces Billions in Penalties From Potential FTC Ad Suit
title_cn: 亚马逊因潜在的联邦贸易委员会广告诉讼而面临数十亿美元的处罚
summary: Amazon.com Inc. is facing a possible lawsuit from the US Federal Trade Commission that may lead to billions of dollars in civil penalties, over claims the e-commerce giant misled advertisers, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Seeking Crypto Policy 'Clarity' in DC
title_cn: 寻求华盛顿加密货币政策的“清晰度”
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Nathan Dean joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Congress and US regulatory agencies will likely embark on an agenda of clarifying the regulatory status of cryptocurrencies in the second half of 2026, lowering enforcement risks for platforms including Coinbase and Robinhood and building a foundation for institutional adoption of the sector. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Binance Prepares for EU Exit With Local License in Limbo
title_cn: 币安为欧盟退出做准备，当地许可证悬而未决
summary: Bloomberg's Anna Irrera joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Binance is making preparations to stop providing services in the European Union, as a deadline to receive a license to operate in the bloc draws near and the crypto exchange has yet to receive approval from Greece’s financial regulator. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Kalshi’s Lopes Lara Turned Kylie Jenner Gossip Into Billions
title_cn: 卡尔希 (Kalshi) 的洛佩斯·拉拉 (Lopes Lara) 如何将凯莉·詹纳 (Kylie Jenner) 的八卦变成数十亿美元
summary: Bloomberg's Emily Nicolle joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Kalshi has developed its own AI agent to help deal with a number of internal processes, including some of the thorniest issues it faces around the wording of its prediction market contracts. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BlackRock Launches New Bitcoin Income ETF
title_cn: 贝莱德推出新的比特币收益 ETF
summary: Robert Mitchnick, global head of digital assets at BlackRock, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." BlackRock launched today the iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF (Ticker: BITA). (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Move Could Bolster Tokenized Stocks
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会的举措可能会提振代币化股票
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Dushyant Shahrawat joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Recent comments from SEC Commissioner Paul Atkins hints that changes may come to Rule 611. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Crypto Short Squeeze Briefly Sends Value to $3T
title_cn: SpaceX 加密货币空头挤压导致价值短暂升至 3T 美元
summary: Bloomberg's Muyao Shen joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." A short squeeze in SpaceX perpetual futures briefly sent the company’s implied valuation to $3 trillion on blockchain-based markets shortly after Monday’s US stock-market close. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Offering On-Chain Private Company Access: Citi's Khaliq
title_cn: 提供链上私人公司访问：花旗的 Khaliq
summary: Shahmir Khaliq, head of services at Citi, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." A new initiative by Citi will allow its institutional clients to trade tokenized shares of private companies on a blockchain. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Crypto Wrap: Strategy Buys More Bitcoin, Robinhood Cuts Jobs
title_cn: 加密货币包装：战略购买更多比特币，Robinhood 裁员
summary: Bloomberg's Monique Mulima joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Robinhood said it’s cutting 10% of its workforce, a reduction of around 300 positions, to “remain lean and disciplined” as it develops new products. Also, Strategy purchased 1,587 bitcoin tokens from June 8 to June 14 for aggregate purchase price of $100m (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Investor Powerlaw Debuts Amid IPO Race
title_cn: SpaceX 投资者 Powerlaw 在 IPO 竞赛中首次亮相
summary: Powerlaw, a closed-end fund that owns stakes in Elon Musk’s SpaceX and artificial intelligence firm OpenAI, traded well above the value of its underlying investments in its debut, capitalizing on retail investors’ clamor for exposure to the hottest private tech companies. Bloomberg's Anthony Hughes and Mike Dinsdale, CEO at Powerlaw join to discuss Powerlaw’s platform allowing exposure to private tech companies as well as the IPO enviroment.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Crypto 6/16/2026
title_cn: 彭博加密货币 6/16/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Citi Head of Services Shahmir Khaliq and BlackRock Global Head of Digital Assets Robert Mitchnick. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lutnick’s Letter to Anthropic Warned of Curbs on Top AI Models
title_cn: Lutnick 致 Anthropic 的信警告顶级人工智能模型受到限制
summary: US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick warned Anthropic PBC in a letter last week that it would need government permission to grant foreign nationals access to its most advanced AI models and threatened criminal and civil penalties if the firm failed to comply, according to a copy seen by Bloomberg News.

title: Read the Lutnick Letter That Led Anthropic to Disable Mythos
title_cn: 阅读导致人类消除神话的卢特尼克信
summary: US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick warned Anthropic PBC Chief Executive Officer Dario Amodei in a letter Friday that the company would need government permission before exporting its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 artificial intelligence models to any destination worldwide, or to any foreign national regardless of location.

title: Databricks Sales Double for Product Rivaling Snowflake
title_cn: Databricks 产品竞争对手 Snowflake 销售额翻倍
summary: Databricks Inc., a privately held software maker that competes with Snowflake Inc. and Alphabet Inc.’s Google, said its data warehousing business has more than doubled in size over the last year, reaching a $1.5 billion annual run rate.

title: Google Rolls Out Android 17; Major AI Features to Follow This Summer
title_cn: 谷歌推出Android 17；今年夏天即将推出的主要人工智能功能
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google has begun rolling out Android 17, the latest major update to its popular mobile operating system, though some of its marquee artificial intelligence features will not arrive for another few months.

title: SpaceX Soars On Third Trading Day, Seals Cursor Takeover | Bloomberg Tech 6/16/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 在第三个交易日飙升，完成 Cursor 收购彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 16 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow tracks SpaceX's value eclipsing Amazon's, this as it lands its $60 billion takeover of Cursor. Plus, Anthropic meets with US officials to resolve a national security dispute with the Trump administration over its most advanced AI models. And, Sequoia Partner Shaun Maguire talks about the AI landscape and why he never wants to sell his SpaceX shares. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Pounces on $60 Billion Cursor Takeover Days After IPO
title_cn: IPO 几天后 SpaceX 发起 600 亿美元 Cursor 收购
summary: Sara Araghi, portfolio manager at Franklin Templeton - which backed SpaceX long before its IPO - says SpaceX cementing its $60 billion takeover of Cursor so quickly "makes sense" considering the company's AI ambitions. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Nears $3 Trillion in Value | Open Interest 6/16/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 市值接近 3 万亿美元 |未平仓合约 2026 年 6 月 16 日
summary:
Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." SpaceX surges again, pushing its value near $3 trillion and ahead of Amazon. And it's a new era at the Fed as Chair Kevin Warsh signals a fresh approach to central bank communication. Plus, Brent crude drops below $80 as a US, Iran deal opens the door to more oil supply. We’ll break down Yum! Brands’ sale of Pizza Hut with Michael Halen, the latest Wall Street layoffs with Katherine Doherty, and we'll hear from RBC CEO Dave McKay on SpaceX, AI, markets, and the US, Canada trade relationship.

Correction : This video has been edited to update a graphic with correct analyst disclosures. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Snap Launches $2,195 Specs, Declaring Glasses the Next Computer
title_cn: Snap 推出售价 2,195 美元的眼镜，宣称眼镜将成为下一代电脑
summary: Snap Inc. introduced Specs, a $2,195 pair of augmented reality glasses that co-founder Evan Spiegel described as a leapfrog advancement and the computer of the future.

title: HPE Boosts Networking Gear for AI Clients, Adds Siemens Energy
title_cn: HPE 与西门子能源合作，为人工智能客户提升网络设备
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. introduced new networking gear for artificial intelligence data centers, building on the products it acquired from Juniper Networks and striving to capture more of the demand for AI tools from corporate customers.

title: Apollo-Backed Rackspace Loan Jumps on AMD Data Center Deal
title_cn: AMD 数据中心交易推动阿波罗支持的 Rackspace 贷款大幅增长
summary: Rackspace Technology Inc., a cloud-computing services company backed by Apollo Global Management Inc., saw its $1.6 billion loan jump after it signed a data center deal with Advanced Micro Devices Inc., extending a rally in debt that had traded at deeply distressed levels just two months ago.

title: Apple Plans Camera AirPods Alongside Upgraded Foldable iPhone in 2027
title_cn: 苹果计划在 2027 年推出带摄像头的 AirPods 和升级版可折叠 iPhone
summary: Apple Inc.’s upcoming camera-equipped AirPods, a product meant to vault the company into the AI device market, is scheduled to launch in late 2027 as part of a flurry of new releases.

title: Ripple Buys Stake in Flutterwave Valuing It at $3.3 Billion
title_cn: Ripple 收购 Flutterwave 股份，估值达 33 亿美元
summary: Flutterwave Inc., one of Africa’s most valuable financial-technology startups, sold an equity stake to Ripple, as it seeks to accelerate growth through payments expansion and strategic partnerships.

title: AI Is Training Staff Very Quickly, Says RBC's McKay
title_cn: 加拿大皇家银行 (RBC) 的麦凯表示，人工智能正在非常快地培训员工
summary: Royal Bank of Canada Chief Executive Officer Dave McKay says it's "unbelievable" how fast artificial intelligence is training staffers. He says the technology is also making workers more efficient. He spoke to Lisa Abramowicz on Tuesday at a Bloomberg Newsmakers event in Toronto.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Vorcaro’s Father to Stay in Jail as Banco Master Plea Deal Fails
title_cn: 银行大师认罪协议失败，沃卡罗父亲将继续入狱
summary: Brazil’s Supreme Court voted to keep former banker Daniel Vorcaro’s father in jail after the latest proposal for a plea deal fell through in the sprawling fraud investigation into failed lender Banco Master.

title: US Draft Deal Includes Financial Incentives for Iran | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/16/2026
title_cn: 美国协议草案包括对伊朗的经济激励权力平衡：最新版 06/16/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA), says she is optimistic Congress can pass bipartisan housing legislation and get it to President Trump's desk. Senator Ron Johnson (R-WI), says he has not seen the full Iran memorandum of understanding and remains skeptical Tehran can be trusted, while arguing the US should keep monitoring Iran and retain the option of further strikes if it moves toward its nuclear program. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sen. Johnson: US Must Keep Iran ‘In a Box’
title_cn: 约翰逊参议员：美国必须将伊朗“限制在一个盒子里”
summary: Senator Ron Johnson (R-WI), a member of the Senate Homeland Security and Finance Committees, says he has not seen the full Iran memorandum of understanding and remains skeptical Tehran can be trusted, while arguing the US should keep monitoring Iran and retain the option of further strikes if it moves toward its nuclear program. He also defends President Trump’s energy policy and says he is generally supportive of reauthorizing FISA Section 702, but wants stronger protections for civil liberties. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Countdown To Fed Rate Decision | The Close 6/16/2026
title_cn: 美联储利率决定倒计时|收盘价 2026 年 6 月 16 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Charles Schwab Chief Investment Strategist Liz Ann Sonders, NYU Stern Finance Professor Aswath Damodaran, Wedbush Securities SVP Equity Research Alicia Reese, Harrison Street Co-Founder & Global CEO Chris Merrill, Man Group Chief Market Strategist Kristina Hooper, JP Morgan Head of Global Rates Strategy Jay Barry, LA Host Committee Co-Chair & LAFC Co-President Larry Freedman, Center for American Progress CEO & Former Senior Advisor to President Biden Neera Tanden, & The Obama Foundation CEO Valerie Jarrett. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brazil Court Convicts Bolsonaro Son of Interference in Trial
title_cn: 巴西法院以干扰审判罪判处博尔索纳罗之子有罪
summary: Brazil’s Supreme Court found former lawmaker Eduardo Bolsonaro guilty of trying to unlawfully interfere with judicial proceedings related to the trial of his father, former President Jair Bolsonaro, who was convicted of plotting a coup after his 2022 election defeat.

title: Read the 14-Point Draft Memorandum Between the US and Iran
title_cn: 阅读美国和伊朗之间的 14 点备忘录草案
summary: The US and Iran are expected to formally sign a memorandum of understanding on June 19 in Switzerland, paving the way for 60 days of talks aimed at ending their war for good and putting strict new limits on Iran’s nuclear program.

title: Senator Warren on Iran Deal, Fed's Warsh and SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 沃伦参议员谈伊朗协议、美联储 Warsh 和 SpaceX IPO
summary: US Senator Elizabeth Warren, a Massachusetts Democrat, says President Donald Trump "can't point to where we're better off" after the war in Iran. Speaking on "Balance of Power: Evening Edition," Senator Warren also discusses Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's military budget request, her criticisms of Kevin Warsh as chair of the Federal Reserve, the state of housing and the SpaceX IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Suspects Charged With Plot to Attack White House UFC Event
title_cn: 嫌疑人被指控密谋袭击白宫 UFC 赛事
summary: The US Justice Department has charged five people in connection with an alleged plot to use explosives and snipers to target wealthy people and prominent politicians who attended a UFC fight Sunday on the White House lawn.

title: Starmer Touts £1.3 Billion of Energy, AI Investment at G7 Summit
title_cn: Starmer 在 G7 峰会上宣布 13 亿英镑的能源和人工智能投资
summary: Keir Starmer announced £1.3 billion of investment into the UK in energy and AI projects at the G7 summit in France, as Britain’s premier tries to convey a sense of business as usual even as he faces the prospect of a leadership challenge.

title: Mexico’s Ruling Party Aims to Void Vote It Lost in a Landslide
title_cn: 墨西哥执政党旨在废除以压倒性优势落败的选票
summary: Mexico’s leftist ruling party is seeking to annul a local election that a centrist opposition party swept earlier this month, raising questions over how the still-dominant Morena party of President Claudia Sheinbaum might respond to setbacks in nationwide midterm elections set for next year.

title: How The Iran War Is Leaving Lasting Scars Across Asia
title_cn: 伊朗战争如何在亚洲留下持久的伤痕
summary: The Strait of Hormuz may reopen, but Asia’s economic scars remain. Why the war’s disruption of trade and energy flows will persist. Listen to the Big Take Asia podcast. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Housing Bill Deal Reached in Congress After Long Standoff
title_cn: 长期僵局后国会达成住房法案协议
summary: Leaders in the US House and Senate announced a deal Tuesday on a sweeping housing bill, ending a months-long standoff between the chambers over competing versions of the measure.

title: Hegseth to Push Burden-Sharing at NATO Defense Meeting This Week
title_cn: 赫格斯将在本周的北约防务会议上推动分担责任
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth will attend a gathering of his NATO counterparts in Belgium this week, pushing a message of burden-sharing that has become a hallmark of Trump administration defense policy.

title: Kevin Warsh Makes His Fed Debut With Trump Pushing for Rate Cuts
title_cn: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 首次亮相美联储，特朗普推动降息
summary: Serious changes are likely coming to the central bank.

title: Senate Republicans Demand Details, Vote on Trump-Iran Deal
title_cn: 参议院共和党人要求细节，对特朗普与伊朗的协议进行投票
summary: Senate Republicans said they’re pressing the Trump administration for details on the US-Iran interim peace deal and signaled Congress will ultimately vote on the final agreement.

title: US Set to Offer Iran Broad Financial Gains in Peace Deal
title_cn: 美国将在和平协议中向伊朗提供广泛的经济收益
summary: Iran is set to receive broad financial incentives as part of its agreement with the US, including the right to sell oil immediately, tap a $300 billion development fund and get eventual access to its frozen assets, according to a final draft of the deal.

title: Russian Warship Fires Warning Shots Near British Yacht
title_cn: 俄罗斯军舰在英国游艇附近鸣枪示警
summary: The UK said a Russian warship fired warning shots near a British yacht just outside of its territorial waters, in an attempt to prevent a possible collision.

title: US, Iran Prepare for Deal Signing as Financial Details Emerge
title_cn: 随着财务细节的出现，美国和伊朗准备签署协议
summary: The US and Iran are preparing to formally sign an interim peace deal that’s left both sides claiming victory, with details of the accord still emerging and energy insiders skeptical of how fast it can reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: US Exports to Cuba Jump as Fuel, Cars and Food Get Past Trump’s Blockade
title_cn: 随着燃料、汽车和食品突破特朗普的封锁，美国对古巴的出口猛增
summary: US exports to Cuba have surged dramatically this year as businesses use a trade loophole to get fuel, appliances, furniture, food and vehicles past President Donald Trump’s wall of sanctions.

title: Pope Leo Hopes US-Iran Peace Deal Will Be Definite End to War
title_cn: 教皇利奥希望美伊和平协议将明确结束战争
summary: Pope Leo XIV welcomed an agreement between Iran and the US to reach a peace deal, expressing hope it will provide a definitive end to the war.

title: Iran Set to Receive Financial Incentives for Ending War
title_cn: 伊朗将因结束战争而获得财政激励
summary:
Bloomberg has learned what the US could give Iran if it agrees to a memorandum of understanding to end the conflict. The deal is expected to be signed on Friday. Bloomberg's Nick Wadhams has all the details.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Taps Defense Act to Boost Stockpiles Worn by Iran War
title_cn: 特朗普利用《国防法案》增加伊朗战争消耗的库存
summary: President Donald Trump invoked the Defense Production Act in an effort to bolster delivery of weapons whose stockpiles critics say have been strained by the war in Iran and other conflicts.

title: Congress Demand Details, Vote on Trump-Iran Deal
title_cn: 国会要求细节，对特朗普-伊朗协议进行投票
summary: Key lawmakers, including Senate Majority Leader John Thune, remained in the dark on Tuesday on the specifics of the so-called memorandum of understanding, a 14-point document that should lead to a two-month ceasefire extension and the start of negotiations over Iran’s nuclear program. Several said they expect to see the document in the coming days as the two countries prepare to sign the agreement in Geneva on Friday. Congresswoman Jennifer McClellan, Democrat representing Virginia's 4th District joined Balance of Power to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Education Department Sheds More Programs in Bid to Dismantle Agency
title_cn: 教育部放弃更多计划以解散机构
summary: The Department of Education is dispersing its civil rights and special education responsibilities to other federal offices, a major step toward the Trump administration’s goal of dismantling the agency.

title: Netanyahu Pays Political Price for Iran Gambit With Trump
title_cn: 内塔尼亚胡为伊朗与特朗普的策略付出政治代价
summary: Benjamin Netanyahu's relationship with Donald Trump has become a liability due to the US president's deal with Iran, which much of Israel opposes. Michael Oren, former Israeli ambassador to the US, joined Balance of Power and he said Israel wasn't consulted on the interim deal between the US and Iran and will continue to do what's necessary to protect itself (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Syria Better Than Israel at Fighting Hezbollah
title_cn: 特朗普称叙利亚在打击真主党方面比以色列更好
summary: US President Donald Trump vented his frustration with Israel’s military campaign in Lebanon, going as far to suggest that Syria would do a better job fighting Hezbollah there.
